title: tlswrapper configuration
description: Configuration file for tlswrapper. At least one of 'mux_listen', 'mux_connect', or 'service.mux_connect' must be present.

type.description: MIME type identifying the config format and version.

id.description: Self identity announced in the handshake.

no_redial.description: Disable automatic tunnel redial in client mode. Default: false.

api_listen.description: Listen address for the HTTP management API (e.g. '127.0.0.1:9081').

mux_listen.description: Address to accept inbound mux connections on (server mode).

mux_connect.description: Address to dial for the outbound mux connection (client mode).

listen.description: Local TCP address to accept application traffic on.

connect.description: Forwarding target address for inbound application streams.

timeout.description: Session inactivity timeout in seconds. Clamped to [5, 86400]. Default: 60.

keepalive.description: Keepalive probe interval in seconds. Clamped to [1, timeout]. Default: 25.

send_timeout.description: Send completion timeout in seconds. Clamped to [5, timeout]. Default: 15.

idle_timeout.description: Session idle timeout in seconds. 0 disables idle eviction; otherwise clamped to [5, 31557600]. Default: 0.

max_sessions.description: Maximum number of concurrent mux sessions. 0 means unlimited.

max_streams.description: Maximum concurrent streams per session. 0 uses the internal default (1024).

stream_window.description: Convenience alias: sets wmem to this value and rmem to twice this value. Clamped to [16384, 16777216].

max_startups.description: Unauthenticated connection throttle in 'start:rate:full' format. Beyond 'start' connections, each new one is dropped with probability 'rate'% until the queue reaches 'full'.

tls.description: TLS configuration. All three of cert, key, and authcerts must be set together, or all must be absent (plaintext mode).

cert.description: PEM certificate. Use '@path' to read the file at startup, or provide an inline PEM string.

key.description: PEM private key. Use '@path' to read the file at startup, or provide an inline PEM string.

ciphersuites.description: Colon-separated list of TLS 1.3 ciphersuites to enable.

authcerts.description: Authorized peer certificates. Each entry is a '@path' reference or an inline PEM string.

mux.description: Socket and buffer settings for the mux (transport-level) connection.

reuseport.description: Enable SO_REUSEPORT on the mux socket. Default: false.

keepalive.description: Enable TCP keepalive on the mux socket. Default: false.

nodelay.description: Enable TCP_NODELAY on the mux socket. Default: true.

sndbuf.description: SO_SNDBUF hint in bytes for the mux socket. 0 uses the system default.

rcvbuf.description: SO_RCVBUF hint in bytes for the mux socket. 0 uses the system default.

backlog.description: Listen backlog for the mux socket. Clamped to [1, 4096]. Default: 16.

max_halfopen.description: Maximum half-open (unacknowledged SYN) streams per session. 0 disables the limit; otherwise clamped to [1, 4096]. Default: 256.

rmem.description: Per-stream receive buffer size in bytes. Clamped to [16384, 16777216]. Default: 262144.

wmem.description: Per-stream send buffer size in bytes. Clamped to [16384, 16777216]. Default: 131072.

mem_pressure.description: Session memory pressure threshold in bytes. 0 auto-derives the value from max_streams and rmem. When positive, clamped to [65536, 2147483647].

stream_open_timeout.description: Stream open timeout in seconds. Default: 30.

stream_close_timeout.description: Stream close timeout in seconds. Default: 120.

tcp.description: Socket options for local (application-side) TCP connections.

reuseport.description: Enable SO_REUSEPORT on local sockets. Default: false.

keepalive.description: Enable TCP keepalive on local sockets. Default: true.

nodelay.description: Enable TCP_NODELAY on local sockets. Default: true.

sndbuf.description: SO_SNDBUF hint in bytes for local sockets. 0 uses the system default.

rcvbuf.description: SO_RCVBUF hint in bytes for local sockets. 0 uses the system default.

backlog.description: Listen backlog for the local listener. Clamped to [1, 4096]. Default: 16.

service.description: Named-service routing entries, keyed by service_id. Each entry configures the routing for one logical service.

additionalProperties.description: Per-service routing configuration. At least one field must be set.

listen.description: Local TCP address to accept application traffic on for this service.

mux_connect.description: Mux endpoint address to dial for this service. Each entry maintains a separate outbound mux session.

connect.description: Forwarding target address for inbound streams tagged with this service_id.
